title: partitions field on config block: commit to runtime semantics or drop from schema
body: POC v2 config.schema.json declares partitions: [{name, blocks: [...]}] — top-level organizational divisions over the substrate. POC's render.ts reads the field but does not consume it. Integration map omits it. Two paths: (a) commit to runtime semantics — partitions scope validateProject passes (a partition's validation runs only over its declared blocks), or partitions become directory subpaths (which DEC-0009 rejects under closure-table-only direction), or partitions become the within-scope-grouping concept DEC-0010 (scope layering) might require; (b) drop from schema as dead config until a runtime use emerges. Without explicit decision, partitions sits as schema-validated noise. Couples to DEC-0009 (storage primitive direction) and DEC-0010 (scope layering). Surfaced as gap #33 in the integration-map review.
